# Cosimo by Medici & Company

> Fund operations infrastructure for private equity, venture, credit, and real estate funds.

---

## Quarterly close. Before lunch.

LP reports, K-1 packages, rent roll extractions, and due diligence memos. Source-cited and audit-ready.

Live funds. Thousands of documents indexed.

---

## Ask anything. Get the work delivered.

Cosimo is an interactive platform where fund operations teams ask questions and receive finished deliverables — not summaries, not drafts.

### Demo: Due Diligence
Upload 847 documents from a data room. Cosimo extracts financials, flags inconsistencies across CIMs and financial statements, and produces a structured due diligence memo with source citations.

### Demo: LP Reporting
Ask about a specific LP's side letter terms from eighteen months ago. Cosimo returns the exact clause, source document, and a draft response in thirty seconds.

### Demo: Rent Roll
Upload property-level rent rolls across a portfolio. Cosimo extracts unit-level data, identifies lease expirations, and flags anomalies — structured and ready for review.

---

## You already know how this goes.

The manual process for quarterly reporting:

1. Pull NAV data from the fund admin portal. Reconcile against internal tracking.
2. Cross-reference capital account statements with waterfall calculations.
3. Extract performance metrics from portfolio company PDFs — one by one.
4. Draft the LP letter in Word. Manually insert figures. Format tables.
5. Route through partner review. Incorporate edits. Re-check every number.
6. Generate individual LP statements by commitment and share class.

**With Cosimo:** 1 person, 15 minutes, 0 review cycles. Every number traceable. Every deliverable ready for audit.

---

## Three things generic AI will never do for your fund.

### 1. Month twelve, your new analyst works like your best partner.
Cosimo learns how you report, what you call things, how your waterfalls work. Institutional knowledge stops living in one person's head.

### 2. The actual K-1 package.
Formatted to your specs, with every figure traced to its source. What used to take your team days gets reviewed and out the door in an afternoon.

### 3. Your LPA terms don't train someone else's model.
Every client runs on a fully segregated instance. Your data and your fund structures never leave your environment.

---

## The work that runs your quarter.

### Due Diligence
- **Before:** 1,200 documents. A team of associates. Two weeks of 14-hour days highlighting PDFs and building spreadsheets.
- **With Cosimo:** Every CIM, financial statement, and legal agreement extracted and cross-referenced. Flags on your desk by Monday. 2 hours vs. 2 weeks manual.

### K-1 Packages
- **Before:** Three weeks. Two temps. A partner reviewing at midnight. Someone still finds an error in March.
- **With Cosimo:** Pulled from fund admin data and validated against source documents. Formatted to your specs. Quarter-end becomes a single review step. Days reduced to hours.

### LP Reporting
- **Before:** An LP asks about a side letter from eighteen months ago. You spend the next hour in the archive room.
- **With Cosimo:** Exact clause. Source document. Draft response. Thirty seconds.

### Portfolio Monitoring
- **Before:** Covenant compliance in spreadsheets. Waterfall calcs done by hand. Anomalies found after they've compounded for a quarter.
- **With Cosimo:** Tracked continuously across all portfolio companies. Anomalies flagged before they compound. Real-time across all entities.

---

## Every fund will work this way. The question is when yours starts.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What fund types does Cosimo support?
Private equity, venture, credit, and real estate funds. Cosimo adapts to your fund's reporting conventions, waterfall structures, and document formats.

### How does Cosimo ensure audit readiness?
Every figure in every deliverable traces back to its source document. Cosimo doesn't summarize — it cites. Reviewers can verify any number in the output against the original.

### What happens to my data?
Every client runs on a fully segregated instance. Your documents, fund structures, and LPA terms never leave your environment and never train a shared model.

### How is Cosimo different from general-purpose AI tools?
Generic AI produces text. Cosimo produces deliverables — formatted K-1 packages, structured LP reports, rent roll extractions — built on your fund's actual data and conventions.

### What does the pilot cost?
Nothing upfront. We scope a pilot around your highest-pain use case and run it for two full quarters on real deadlines. If it doesn't change how your fund operates, walk away.

---

## Start a Pilot

### Run it for a quarter. Then decide.

**Step 1 — Discovery (30 minutes)**
We learn how your fund actually operates — what documents you produce, where the bottlenecks are. We scope the pilot to the use case that hurts most.

**Step 2 — Onboarding (1–2 weeks)**
Your dedicated instance is configured around your fund's documents and reporting calendar.

**Step 3 — Live Pilot (4–6 months)**
Most vendors give you a two-week trial. We give you two full quarters with real documents on real deadlines. We know what happens.

No lock-in. No IT project. If it doesn't change how your fund operates, walk away.
